class.name: DSVExporter
class.description: DSVExporter writes string rows as delimiter-separated text. Fields containing delimiters, quotes, or line breaks are quoted and quotes are escaped by doubling them.

method.name: export
method.description: Writes string rows from [param data] to [param file_path].

method.name: export_string
method.description: Converts string rows from [param data] into delimiter-separated text.
